docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE 0.00- SERVED JUN-28-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, WHITNEY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $943.16 FILED BY MCGUIRE, ANGELIQUE AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, WHITNEY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-29-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
